word: H2707 - חָקָה - châqâh - khaw-kaw' - Carved work

sections.paragraph:
Original: חקה

Transliteration: châqâh

Phonetic: khaw-kaw'

BDB Definition:

  1. to cut, carve, cut in
    1. (Pual) carved (participle)
    2. (Hithpael) to engrave, cut a limit

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 727

Part(s) of speech: Verb
